admin
*****


Description
===========

Admin operations for streaming service


Available Commands
==================

* connect-harness

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * update

* stream

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * update

* stream-pool

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * list

  * update

* work-request

  * get

* work-request-error-collection

  * list-work-request-errors

* work-request-log-entry

  * list-work-request-logs

* work-request-summary-collection

  * list-work-requests
